rulings.Case Title: JAMIE DAVIS VS. 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 1, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. Defendant may be liable for unreasonable delay in processing a claim. Hailey, 158 Cal.App.4th 452. The second amended complaint alleges an unjustified delay of over two years. Accordingly it states a claim to that extent. =(302/CK/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE DAVIS VS. 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 1, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. Granted as undisputed regarding prayer for attorneys fees, costs, interest, and allegations regarding defendant's alleged refusal to pay the award. Denied as to the request for punitive damages: The asserted basis of invasion of privacy in demanding private medical records without cause may support the claim for punitive damages. =(302/CK/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH KAPLAN VS. NAJIB YASER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 1, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT NAJIB YASER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with FIVE DAYS leave to amend. If the property is residential then allegations pursuant to the San Francisco Rent Ordinance are required; and these do not appear in the complaint. The lease at issue appears to be residential, stating at paragraph 4 that the property must be occupied by lessee and his family exclusively as a private single family dwelling. If the lease is in fact for a commercial property as plaintiff suggests and the lease is not to be read as one for residential property, then this must be affirmatively pled in the compliant. =(302/CK/PB)
